name: web-commitment-resolve-parity
goal: Route the web PATCH /api/commitments/:id through CommitmentsService.resolve() (back-prop + lock + prune-safety) with a debounced QMD reindex, without reopening the concurrency lost-write window.

userStories.title: Route PATCH through a promise-memoized, serialized factory-wired service
userStories.description: Replace the raw fs read/write in PATCH /:id with services.commitments.resolve(id, status). Build AreteServices once per router via a synchronously memoized construction promise; serialize resolves through a settled-promise queue mutex; map errors to 404/400.
acceptanceCriteria: Resolving sets status + resolvedAt in commitments.json AND checks off the linked @from(commitment:<prefix>) task to [x]
status dropped leaves the linked task untouched
Services obtained via servicesPromise ??= createServices(workspaceRoot) assigned before any await; reset on rejection (HIGH-2)
Resolves serialized through a closure-scoped promise-queue mutex advancing on a settled promise; each caller gets its own result/error (HIGH-1)
Unknown id -> 404 (tested); invalid status -> 400; message-substring mapping has a code comment referencing commitments.ts throw sites
Response body remains { commitment }; no frontend change

userStories.title: Debounced, coalesced, self-guarded QMD reindex
userStories.description: Closure-scoped debounced refreshQmdIndex so a burst triggers one reindex ~5s after the last resolve; self-guarded detached callback.
acceptanceCriteria: Each successful resolve re-arms a ~5s timer (clearTimeout before setTimeout), timer is .unref()'d
On fire calls refreshQmdIndex(workspaceRoot, config.qmd_collection) with config loaded once per router
Detached callback wrapped in try/catch AND async refresh .catch()-guarded; logs QmdRefreshResult.warning/embedWarning
PATCH responses are not blocked on the reindex

userStories.title: Tests + build
userStories.description: Backend route tests incl. high-contention no-lost-writes, plus rebuild committed dist.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests: resolved -> file + task [x]; dropped -> task untouched; unknown id -> 404; debounce fires once per burst (spy the callback, not real refreshQmdIndex which is skipped under ARETE_SEARCH_FALLBACK=1)
High-contention test: >=50 parallel PATCHes to distinct ids on ONE shared router; all end resolved, zero lost writes; proven RED with the mutex removed (HIGH-3)
pnpm build succeeds; dist/ rebuilt and committed
